name: ollama
description: > **The big idea:** You don't need a paid cloud subscription (ChatGPT Plus, Claude Pro, etc.) > to get real work done with AI. You can run capable models **on your own laptop**, for free, > fully offline — and even wire them into small programs ("agents") that do useful things like > scaffolding a project, writing documentation, or generating code. > > This repo teaches you how, step by step, with **three working example agents** you can run today.
